CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2023 Continued To Sep-13-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Continued To Aug-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:23:03 a.m and concluding at 11:31:18 a.m.

Gregor A Hensrude Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Darrin A Dolle Inc.
Defendant Jack Rhiel not appearing.

DARRIN DOLLE is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.
DARRIN DOLLE is examined by the Court.

The Court ORDERS the matter continued to August 02, 2023 at 9:00 am in Department 505 to allow Plaintiff time to produce additional evidence in support of Plaintiffs request for Default judgment. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Continued To Jul-12-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
